# Accomplishments

- Reduced p99 API latency by 40% by migrating synchronous REST calls to gRPC streaming, cutting tail latency from 800ms to 480ms across 12 microservices.
- Led zero-downtime migration of a 500GB PostgreSQL database to a multi-region active-passive setup, improving availability from 99.9% to 99.97% and saving $200K annually in infrastructure costs.
- Designed and deployed a Kubernetes-based CI/CD platform that cut deployment times by 60%, reducing engineer toil by 4 hours/week per team.
- Implemented distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry across 20 Go services, reducing mean time to detect (MTTD) production incidents from 45 minutes to under 8 minutes.
- Containerized 15 legacy services with Docker and Helm charts, eliminating cross-environment inconsistencies and reducing new-engineer onboarding time by 3 days.
